subject: Network & Learn at the World Cardiology Conference in Kuala Lumpur
body:
We are pleased to invite you to participate in the 2nd World Conference on Cardiology and Vascular Medicine, taking place on April 13–14, 2026, in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia.

This international conference will unite respected clinicians, researchers, academicians, and healthcare professionals from across the globe to exchange scientific knowledge, clinical expertise, and recent innovations in Cardiology and Vascular Medicine. The program is carefully designed to promote meaningful academic discussion, professional development, and international collaboration.

You are warmly invited to submit your abstract and take part in this high-impact international gathering. Your contribution will play an important role in advancing research and clinical excellence in the field.

Learn more & register: https://eurasiaconferences.com/events/kuala-lumpur/2026/cardiology-and-vascular-medicine

We would be truly honored to welcome you in Kuala Lumpur for this prestigious global event.

For any assistance or additional information, please feel free to contact us at any time.

Warm regards,
Olivia Smith
WCCVM-Kuala Lumpur-2026
Eurasia Conferences
124 City Road, London, EC1V 2NX.

The revelation adds new context to Trump’s behavior surrounding the classified files and potentially broadens the timeline for any potential criminality and obstruction. [HuffPost]GOP SET TO SCORE BIG FOR TAX CHEATS The White House is considering trading away part of the historic boost in IRS funding in order to seal a deal to raise the debt limit. Some lawmakers are not happy with the idea. “Cutting funding for the IRS to track down the hidden cash of wealthy tax cheats — funding that will raise as much as $1 trillion. Terrible idea,” Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) said amid the reports. [HuffPost]GOP-LED PANEL RECOMMENDS TEXAS A.G. FOR IMPEACHMENT A Texas House ethics panel recommended that Attorney General Ken Paxton (R) be impeached after a months-long investigation into alleged abuse of office. The decision came after investigators presented evidence accusing the man of sweeping impropriety that verged on criminality, including claims Paxton had used his position to help a political ally, engaged in bribery and attempted to obstruct justice. [HuffPost]OATH KEEPER FOUNDER SENTENCED TO 18 YEARS Elmer Stewart Rhodes, the founder of the far-right group the Oath Keepers, was sentenced to 18 years behind bars Thursday, six months after being convicted of seditious conspiracy in federal court for his role in the attack on the U.S. Capitol. “You, sir, present an ongoing threat and a peril to this country and to the republic and to the very fabric of this democracy,” the presiding judge said to Rhodes before handing down the sentence. [HuffPost] Six things thin parents of fat kids need to understand. "Most people don’t need pacemakers until retirement age. I had to get one at 26." Here's what experts say about using ashwagandha as a stress treatment. The one thing you shouldn't say to toddlers to get them to leave the park. Sleep paralysis is terrifying. Here's what you can actually do about it. Here's why you wake up super early after a night of drinking. Study finds 1 in 10 get long COVID after omicron infection. Get the latest coronavirus updates on our dedicated page LIZZO’S TINA TRIBUTE Superstar singer Lizzo honored the late, great Tina Turner during a show-stopping moment in Phoenix on Wednesday, shortly after Turner's representatives announced her death at the age of 83. “As a Black girl in a rock band, I would not exist if it was not for the queen of rock ‘n’ roll,” Lizzo said at the concert. [HuffPost]GOPer SAYS BIDEN HAS A BIAS… AGAINST WHITE MALE JUDGES Rep. Glenn Grothman (R-Wis.) made some eyebrow-raising comments on the House floor Thursday, saying President Joe Biden has only appointed five “white guys” in his first two years in office, adding he was expecting “maybe 25 or 30” instead. “Almost impossible for white guys [that are] not gay apparently to get appointed here,” he said. [HuffPost]GOP EYING CHILD LABOR? Lawmakers in several states are embracing legislation to let children work in more hazardous occupations, for more hours on school nights and in expanded roles, including serving alcohol in bars and restaurants as young as 14. The efforts, largely led by Republicans, are meant to address worker shortages. [AP]REFUGEES BECOME HOT BUTTON ISSUE IN TURKEY Kemal Kilicdaroglu, who underperformed in the first round of Turkey's elections after finishing second to President Recep Tayyip Erdogan, has hardened his stance on migration to win over voters. body:

subject: Ola,
body:
Ola,

Por favor, se você receber esta mensagem em sua pasta SPAM/BULK, devido às
restrições implementadas pelo seu provedor de serviços de Internet, pedimos
que você a trate de forma genuína e gentilmente mova-a para sua caixa de
entrada.

Isto é para notificá-lo de que todos os esforços para contatá-lo foram
malsucedidos. Também enviei vários e-mails, mas nenhuma confirmação. Estou
escrevendo para notificá-lo do relatório de progresso referente aos seus
fundos não reclamados, seguindo as diretrizes das observações iniciais do
Diretor Geral na coletiva de imprensa sobre a COVID-19 na sexta-feira,
Quarta-feira, 11 de junho de 2025.

Fomos instruídos pelas Nações Unidas (ONU)/Banco Mundial e pelo Governo
Federal dos Estados Unidos a liberar todos os fundos/cartões ATM não
reclamados aos beneficiários para reduzir a recessão devido ao surto do
Coronavírus COVID-19.

Todos os nossos esforços para liberar os fundos não reclamados para sua
conta bancária foram infrutíferos. Várias tentativas foram feitas pelo
nosso Departamento de Remessas/Cartões ATM para autorizar o seu cartão
conforme orientação do Governo Federal dos Estados Unidos, mas a
restauração do sistema não conseguiu concluir o processo com êxito. Foi uma
grande surpresa receber esta manhã uma Carta de Autorização dando
autorização à MRS. AMY BARTHEL para reivindicar seus fundos, a carta

meses atrás como resultado do Coronavírus "Covid-19" e você a autorizou a
receber seus fundos de pagamento de Compensação / Herança no valor de US$
10,5 Milhão de dolares.

Por favor, confirme com urgência a autenticidade da Carta de Autorização
enviada por seu parente (Sra. Amy Barthel), pois você pode ver os dados
bancários abaixo, ela já enviou para transferência de fundos. Por favor,
para evitar o envio de seus fundos para uma pessoa errada, atualize-nos com
sua conta bancária atual onde deseja receber os fundos imediatamente. Por
favor, você pode nos fornecer um número pessoal de Telegram ou Telegram
para que possamos entrar em contato com você, ou você pode adicionar e
conversar comigo no WhatsApp +1 (912) 806-8053.
